_comment: Per-project configuration. Copy to <your-repo>/.workflow/project-config.json and fill in values.

_instructions.repo: Repository in owner/name format. Used for PRs/MRs, work item linking, and code checkout.
_instructions.default_branch: Branch that PRs/MRs target and agents branch from. Usually 'main' or 'master'.
_instructions.board_project_option_id: The option ID for this project in the board's 'Project' field. See your adapter's README for how to retrieve this.
_instructions.project_instructions_file: The file in the repo root that contains project-specific instructions for agents. Common values: CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, CONTRIBUTING.md, AGENTS.md.
_instructions.notes_directory: Directory inside the repo for agent notes, evidence, and orchestrator state. Must be gitignored.
_instructions.spec_directory: Where design specs are stored. Default: docs/specs
_instructions.plan_directory: Where implementation plans are stored. Default: docs/plans
_instructions.branch_prefix_pattern: Pattern for feature branch names. Use <story-name> as placeholder. Default: feat/<story-name>
_instructions.methodology: Development methodology agents follow. Options: tdd (default, RED-GREEN-REFACTOR), bdd, test-after. TDD is strongly recommended.
_instructions.test_commands: Commands each agent runs to verify tests pass. Keyed by area (backend, frontend, etc).
_instructions.coverage_thresholds: Minimum coverage percentage per area. Agents fail if below threshold.
_instructions.skills: Optional. Workflow-enhancing skills agents can use. See docs/skill-integration.md for details.

skills._comment: Optional skills that agents can use during their phase. See docs/skill-integration.md for available frameworks and examples.
